title: Clear S016 permission and tenant live E2E blocker
goal: Run the permission and tenant E2E against a reachable disposable Devpilot API and update G003 blocker evidence.
forbidden_scope: Do not rewrite S016/S018 historical result files; add S019 follow-up evidence instead.
Do not mark restore, provider provisioning, backup, or rollback blockers as cleared in this slice.
Do not change production auth or tenant behavior unless the E2E exposes a real bug.
acceptance: A disposable Devpilot API is reachable or a concrete environment blocker is recorded.
scripts/devpilot-permission-tenant-e2e.mjs exits with status passed against that API, or a real product bug/external blocker is recorded.
Noisy startup, migration, and E2E logs are stored under /tmp/codex-tool-runs/svton/.
Board state records whether the S016 live E2E blocker is cleared.
summary: Cleared the S016 live permission/tenant E2E blocker against a disposable local Devpilot API.
